extraction.one_line_summary: MYLECHKIN Jakob took his 12th career stage win in a sprint finish, with MARINI holding leaders jersey by 1 second over MYLECHKIN
tactical_patterns: Winner and Unitedhealthcare attempted attacks on flat run-in but terrain too benign, reconfirming need for gradient for selection
Japanese rider OSHIMA successfully led out MARINI despite sprint finish chaos, showing Asian-European team collaboration functional

rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: positive: Leading GC by 1 second while hunting contract shows mental composure under dual pressure of results and employment
rider_signals.MYLECHKIN Jakob: positive: 12 stage wins across 8 race editions reveals unmatched Asian circuit sprint dominance, 7 wins in single early edition
rider_signals.HILL Ben: neutral: Accumulated bonus seconds from breakaways across multiple stages, positioning via intermediate sprints rather than GC rides
